notes: Media Phase 3Y starter manifest only. Adds two production-safe generic non-documentary shopping/outlet/retail atmosphere source entries per remaining full-unknown outlet for hero.webp and gallery1.webp. No images are downloaded by this manifest creation task; Wikimedia File sourceUrl values intentionally omit downloadUrl so the importer can auto-resolve originals. Existing unknown legacy image files remain untouched until a later import/replace step.

reviewSummary.sourceSafetyRationale: Selected only Wikimedia Commons File pages with public-domain, CC0, or Creative Commons licenses. Sources are generic retail/shopping atmosphere, retail object, storefront, or icon/illustration visuals and are not presented as documentary photos of the target outlets. Selections avoid official/operator media and avoid recognizable named outlet placeholders.

excludedSources.sourceUrl: Official/operator image libraries and outlet brand pages
excludedSources.reason: Excluded because official/operator images require documented permission and this starter batch is limited to production-safe public-domain/CC/project-safe generic sources.

excludedSources.sourceUrl: Exact-source candidates already deferred in Media Phase 3W/3X for Noventa, Provence, Castel Romano, Berlin, Roosendaal, La Reggia, Málaga, Montabaur, and Maasmechelen
excludedSources.reason: Excluded from this generic starter manifest because exact outlet-source search had already deferred these full-unknown outlets and this batch intentionally uses generic non-documentary sources only.

excludedSources.sourceUrl: Commons files depicting named outlet centers, recognizable malls, operator signage, or branded outlet architecture unrelated to the target outlet
excludedSources.reason: Excluded because generic placeholders must not depict another identifiable outlet or mall and must not imply a false location-specific documentary image.

excludedSources.sourceUrl: Unknown-provenance web images and non-CC stock/social images
excludedSources.reason: Excluded because the product media rule forbids unknown-provenance web images and requires production-safe licensing or ownership.

reviewSummary.sourceReuseRationale: No exact sourceUrl is reused in this starter manifest. Icon/object-style generic sources were mixed with retail-atmosphere sources to avoid repeating one visual across many outlets while keeping the batch non-documentary and production-safe.
reviewSummary.manifestDecision: Manifest created with 18 entries: hero.webp and gallery1.webp for each of the 9 remaining full-unknown outlets. gallery2.webp and gallery3.webp remain deferred for later production-safe sourcing.
